Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface IReasonerOutput

All Known Subinterfaces:
IProofRule, IReasonerFailure
All Known Implementing Classes:
ProofRule, ReasonerFailure, ReasonerOutput
public interface IReasonerOutput
Common interface for the output of a reasoner.

Objects of this type should be generated using the factory methods provided for their subclasses.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • ProverFactory
  • IReasonerFailure
  • IProofRule

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IReasoner
    generatedBy()
    Returns the reasoner that was used to generate this reasoner output
    IReasonerInput
    generatedUsing()
    Returns the reasoner input that was used to generate this reasoner output
    IReasonerDesc
    getReasonerDesc()
    Returns a descriptor of the reasoner that was used to generate this reasoner output.
